arguments.name: namespace
arguments.description: Optional namespace to limit health check scope (default: all namespaces)

arguments.name: check_events
arguments.description: Include recent warning/error events (true/false, default: true)

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: Optional parameter selecting which context to run the prompt in. Defaults to fake-context if not set

description: Perform comprehensive health assessment of Kubernetes/OpenShift cluster
name: cluster-health-check
